name: merge-main-user-interface
description: Merge local main into feat-user-interface and realign the branch with the current mainline behavior for project-status, context compilation, repository wiring, and spec persistence semantics. The change preserves branch-specific user-interface work while adopting main's conventions and absorbed upstream spec behavior, then revalidates artifacts, implementation links, and verification flow for archiving.
